# v1.1.0

Began version tracking & change logs, which was heavily inspired by [monkeytype](https://monkeytype.com/).

## Changes

- Added rudimentary version tracking & change logs
- Added a basic guide for the calculator
- Added sidebar to accomodate the growing population of buttons & dials (and new pages in the future)
- Various UI improvements
